children.text: new or liberalized benefits payable from the Fund under this part, including annuity increases other than under ;section 4065 of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations to Fund
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations to Fund
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Fund for each fiscal year an amount equal to the amount of the Foreign Service normal cost for that year which is not met by contributions to the Fund under .section 4045(a) of this title
